---
title: "Anthropic Courses on Artificial Intelligence"
date: "July 13, 2026"
jupyter: python3
description: "Learn Claude from Anthropic"
---

Anthropic Courses appears to be Anthropic’s training hub for learning Claude, AI fluency, API development, MCP, and Claude Code. Their course catalog includes beginner-friendly courses like Claude 101 and more advanced topics such as building with the Claude API and Claude Code.

These courses are useful if you want to:

  * Learn Claude from the basics.

  * Build Claude-powered apps.

  * Understand MCP and tool use.

  * Improve prompt engineering and AI workflows.


[Anthropic (Claude) AI Courses](https://anthropic.skilljar.com/).
